svg.text: FastAPI Router · CORS Middleware · Rate Limiter (60 req/min, sliding window) · Pydantic Schema Validation
NLP Heuristics · Shannon Entropy · Levenshtein Edit Distance · ELA Image Analysis · Structural / Statistical Features
ML Detection Engine — 6 independent specialist modules
Scikit-learn trained pipelines (phishing, URL) + custom heuristic estimators (deepfake, prompt, behavior, AI content)
Score 0–100 · Safe / Low / Medium / High / Critical · Confidence via: score extremity + feature signal + ambiguity penalty
5–6 context-aware actions per threat type · Priority: Immediate / High / Medium / Low · Severity escalation logic
Cross-module signal correlation · Unified compound risk score · Multi-vector attack detection
Adversarial Testing Engine BONUS — robustness validation
Transforms inputs (obfuscation · encoding tricks · legitimacy padding) · Re-runs detection · Compares original vs adversarial scores
